creator: alley1@llnl.gov
text:
On Wed, 3 Oct 2001, Dirk Meyer wrote:

>
> This is intended. Whenever a new patchlevel came out,
> Makefile and distinfo has to be updated.

Thanks for the reply Dirk.  I have since realized the
importance of the distinfo file in keeping the port
sanitary. It makes a lot of since from that perspective.

		Ed
